Email Outbound - Week 1 (Block 3)

Guidelines
- Target: founder-led services/agencies with visible follow-up/qualification gaps
- Personalize first line
- Keep under 120 words
- One CTA only

Email 1 (Initial)
Subject: quick idea for {{company}} pipeline

{{first_name}} —
Noticed {{context_signal}}.

If you’re open to it, I can show you a simple operator stack we use to increase qualified bookings without adding headcount:
- qualification-first intake
- follow-up automation + manual override
- weekly winner/loser testing on message + offer

Worth a 25-min strategy call next week?

{{sender_name}}

Link:
https://purple-moss-015d42e0f.1.azurestaticapps.net/?utm_source=email&utm_medium=outbound&utm_campaign=b3_w1_email_initial&utm_content=e1

Email 2 (Follow-up)
Subject: re: {{company}} bookings

Quick follow-up, {{first_name}}.

If useful, I can send a one-page breakdown of:
- current likely leakage points
- the first 7-day sprint to fix them
- KPI model for cash/day impact

Should I send that or close this out?

{{sender_name}}

Link:
https://purple-moss-015d42e0f.1.azurestaticapps.net/?utm_source=email&utm_medium=outbound&utm_campaign=b3_w1_email_followup&utm_content=e2

Email 3 (Breakup)
Subject: close file?

Last ping, {{first_name}}.

If improving qualification + booked calls is not a priority this quarter, no problem and I’ll close the loop.

If it is, here’s the qualification page:
https://purple-moss-015d42e0f.1.azurestaticapps.net/?utm_source=email&utm_medium=outbound&utm_campaign=b3_w1_email_breakup&utm_content=e3

Either way, rooting for your growth.

{{sender_name}}
